---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Reproduction Steps
To reproduce this behavior, please follow these steps:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 📸 Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 🖥️ Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 10, macOS 12.0, Ubuntu 20.04]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Firefox, Safari]
- Version: [e.g. 22.0.0]

## 📋 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## 🔍 Possible Solution
If you have any ideas on how to fix this, please let us know.

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I have searched through the existing issues to make sure this bug has not been reported already
- [ ] I have provided enough information for the maintainers to reproduce and understand the issue
- [ ] I have followed the repository's contribution guidelines
